name: Sweet and Sour Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage.
2. Layer the shredded cabbage with onion slices, green pepper slices, and raisins in a large bowl.
3. Sprinkle sugar over all; stir to combine.
4. Set aside for at least 30 minutes (preferably overnight).
5. For the dressing, combine sugar, dry mustard, celery seed, mustard seed, vinegar, and olive oil in a saucepan.
6. Bring to a boil, then let it cool.
7. Pour the cooled dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss lightly until well combined.
8. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours (or overnight) to allow flavors to meld.
9. Stir before serving. Makes 16 to 20 servings.
Preparation time: 30 minutes
